title: MedProbeBenchScore
description: Score artifact for the first-party clean-room MedProbeBench-style claim-level citation-accountability benchmark (Mechanical Inventory B2). Written to benchmark/medprobe/scores/latest.json. Benchmark metadata, NOT a verification/medicolegal record — the audit ledger is never touched. B2.1a writes the INERT (scorer-pending) form; B2.1b fills the scored fields.

armed.description: true only once the corpus is clinician-attested AND the scorer is wired. SKIP-inert (false) until then — mirrors the MIRAGE armed-but-inert idiom.

citation_accountability_rate.description: Fraction of attested SUPPORTED claims whose cited evidence actually supports them (scored, B2.1b).

hallucination_catch_rate.description: Fraction of attested UNSUPPORTED/FABRICATED-citation claims correctly flagged. HARD gate == 1.00 (B2.1b).
